brand-story-img-m3n4o5.query: Velmora was born from a simple belief — that fine jewelry should feel personal, not precious. We craft each piece in 18K gold plate with the same attention to detail as heritage jewelers, but at a price that lets you live in your jewelry, not just save it for special occasions. Jewelry that tells your story
